key_papers.authors: Wang J, Tierney L, Mann R, et al.
key_papers.abstract_snippet: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is the most common motor neuron (MN) disease, with no present cure. The progressive loss of MNs is the hallmark of ALS.
